item.title: Probably more helpful to think of them not so much as “Canad…
item.author: Katie Mack (@astrokatie.com)
item.description: Probably more helpful to think of them not so much as “Canadian wildfires” but rather “climate change wildfires currently consuming Canada”
item.content:encoded: Probably more helpful to think of them not so much as “Canadian wildfires” but rather “climate change wildfires currently consuming Canada”

item.title: Aww. It looks like someone's Hollywood star needs a chain li…
item.author: Sort of Damocles (@sortofdamocles.bsky.social)
item.description: Aww. It looks like someone's Hollywood star needs a chain link fence, scaffolding, a stripey curtain-tarp, and two or three National Guard soldiers protecting it.
item.content:encoded: Aww. It looks like someone's Hollywood star needs a chain link fence, scaffolding, a stripey curtain-tarp, and two or three National Guard soldiers protecting it.

item.title: UK's incoming PM Andy Burnham is expected to scrap Keir Star…
item.author: Techmeme (@techmeme.com)
item.description:
UK's incoming PM Andy Burnham is expected to scrap Keir Starmer's plans for digital ID cards; last year a petition opposing the cards attracted ~3M signatures (Geraldine McKelvie/The Guardian)

Main Link | Techmeme Permalink
item.content:encoded:
UK's incoming PM Andy Burnham is expected to scrap Keir Starmer's plans for digital ID cards; last year a petition opposing the cards attracted ~3M signatures (Geraldine McKelvie/The Guardian)

Main Link | Techmeme Permalink

item.title: フリッツ・タウロウ『水車』。タウロウは19世紀ノルウェーの画家であり、同国各地の風景を描きました。彼は水を驚くほど写実的…
item.author: バーナム博物館長 (@barnummuseum.bsky.social)
item.description:
フリッツ・タウロウ『水車』。タウロウは19世紀ノルウェーの画家であり、同国各地の風景を描きました。彼は水を驚くほど写実的に描くことでよく知られており、画像の絵もさざ波立つ水面とこれに反射する光の表現がちょっとありえない領域に達しています(一瞬写真かと思ってしまいますが、拡大してよく見てみると絵です)。また水以外の建物等も丁寧に描き込んであります。
#アート
item.content:encoded:
フリッツ・タウロウ『水車』。タウロウは19世紀ノルウェーの画家であり、同国各地の風景を描きました。彼は水を驚くほど写実的に描くことでよく知られており、画像の絵もさざ波立つ水面とこれに反射する光の表現がちょっとありえない領域に達しています(一瞬写真かと思ってしまいますが、拡大してよく見てみると絵です)。また水以外の建物等も丁寧に描き込んであります。
#アート

item.title: Night night, sweet dreamies. 🧡 Never lose your sense of fu…
item.author: George The Station Cat (@george-station-cat.bsky.social)
item.description:
Night night, sweet dreamies. 🧡

Never lose your sense of fun.
A shared smile can brighten someone’s day, and if no offence was ever intended, don’t be afraid to keep spreading kindness through laughter.
item.content:encoded:
Night night, sweet dreamies. 🧡

Never lose your sense of fun.
A shared smile can brighten someone’s day, and if no offence was ever intended, don’t be afraid to keep spreading kindness through laughter.

item.title: #🔖世の中 「伏してお願い」皇室典範改正案、麻生太郎氏の“執念” 実妹も養親対象に 「何としても今国会において典範改…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖世の中
「伏してお願い」皇室典範改正案、麻生太郎氏の“執念”　実妹も養親対象に

「何としても今国会において典範改正を成し遂げたい」。自民の「安定的な皇位継承の確保に関する懇談会」会長も務める麻生氏は、派閥会合で熱っぽく意欲を語った。 2024年に始まった与野党による皇族数確保策の議論は、2月の衆院選を経て与党が圧倒的多数を握ったことで加速。衆参両院の正副議長は6月上旬、（1）女性皇...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖世の中
「伏してお願い」皇室典範改正案、麻生太郎氏の“執念”　実妹も養親対象に

「何としても今国会において典範改正を成し遂げたい」。自民の「安定的な皇位継承の確保に関する懇談会」会長も務める麻生氏は、派閥会合で熱っぽく意欲を語った。 2024年に始まった与野党による皇族数確保策の議論は、2月の衆院選を経て与党が圧倒的多数を握ったことで加速。衆参両院の正副議長は6月上旬、（1）女性皇...

item.content:encoded: jumping on the jimothy train

item.title: おはようございます 昨夜、劇場版プロセカを観ました。頑張ってる×ミクちゃんが可哀想で涙が出たし、プロセカのメンバー皆んな…
item.author: りょんぱぱ (@bunpepapa.bsky.social)
item.description:
おはようございます
昨夜、劇場版プロセカを観ました。頑張ってる×ミクちゃんが可哀想で涙が出たし、プロセカのメンバー皆んな頑張ってて涙が出たし、ライブシーンがとても良くて涙が出たし、ずっと泣いてた気がする😆
涙腺がぶっ壊れてるな…

特にニーゴのライブのシーンは良かった！絵も綺麗で可愛くて本当に良かった！円盤あるなら買っちゃうかも知れない。俺、えななんが大好きすぎるんだわ🥰
item.content:encoded:
おはようございます
昨夜、劇場版プロセカを観ました。頑張ってる×ミクちゃんが可哀想で涙が出たし、プロセカのメンバー皆んな頑張ってて涙が出たし、ライブシーンがとても良くて涙が出たし、ずっと泣いてた気がする😆
涙腺がぶっ壊れてるな…

特にニーゴのライブのシーンは良かった！絵も綺麗で可愛くて本当に良かった！円盤あるなら買っちゃうかも知れない。俺、えななんが大好きすぎるんだわ🥰

item.title: おはようございます。本日は、曇り。 一日中湿度が高いようです🥲 お天気も不安定みたいですね。 念のため雨具の用意してお…
item.author: しろまむ (@shiromamu.bsky.social)
item.description:
おはようございます。本日は、曇り。
一日中湿度が高いようです🥲
お天気も不安定みたいですね。
念のため雨具の用意しておいた方がいいかも(昨日妹は急な豪雨を心配して傘でなくカッパを持ってきてました)
皆さま、体調に気をつけてください、どうぞ素敵な土曜日をお過ごしください💖💖

再掲の、百合。
庭でももうすぐ咲くけど、これより少し控えめな子なのです。
白百合と一口に言っても、いろいろ個性があるものだね。
喜多見駅から劇団に行く途中にも、綺麗な百合が咲いてますよ♪

#百合
#庭の花
#ブルスコ写真部
#戦争に反対するお花畑の会
item.content:encoded:
おはようございます。本日は、曇り。
一日中湿度が高いようです🥲
お天気も不安定みたいですね。
念のため雨具の用意しておいた方がいいかも(昨日妹は急な豪雨を心配して傘でなくカッパを持ってきてました)
皆さま、体調に気をつけてください、どうぞ素敵な土曜日をお過ごしください💖💖

再掲の、百合。
庭でももうすぐ咲くけど、これより少し控えめな子なのです。
白百合と一口に言っても、いろいろ個性があるものだね。
喜多見駅から劇団に行く途中にも、綺麗な百合が咲いてますよ♪

#百合
#庭の花
#ブルスコ写真部
#戦争に反対するお花畑の会

item.title: #🔖世の中 YouTubeで広がる著名人の“名言”動画 追跡すると海外で…？ | NHKニュース 美輪明宏さんや松下…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖世の中
YouTubeで広がる著名人の“名言”動画 追跡すると海外で…？ | NHKニュース

美輪明宏さんや松下幸之助氏、それに所ジョージさんなど…… 誰もが知る著名人が語ったとされることばを、含蓄のある“名言”として紹介する動画が、いまYouTubeで多く広がっています。 ところが、なか…
item.content:encoded:
#🔖世の中
YouTubeで広がる著名人の“名言”動画 追跡すると海外で…？ | NHKニュース

美輪明宏さんや松下幸之助氏、それに所ジョージさんなど…… 誰もが知る著名人が語ったとされることばを、含蓄のある“名言”として紹介する動画が、いまYouTubeで多く広がっています。 ところが、なか…

item.title: THREAD: The boy is called a liar. He’s told not to defend hi…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
THREAD: The boy is called a liar. He’s told not to defend himself.

Then the private school owner encourages all of his peers to attack him, one by one. She hits him, repeatedly, with a plastic pipe-like object.

How does this school still exist — and receive state funds? 🧵
item.content:encoded:
THREAD: The boy is called a liar. He’s told not to defend himself.

Then the private school owner encourages all of his peers to attack him, one by one. She hits him, repeatedly, with a plastic pipe-like object.

How does this school still exist — and receive state funds? 🧵

item.description:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
DOUBLE HELIX BLOSSOM 第99話 SWAV,アサウラ,西馬ごめゆき | 週刊コロコロコミック

ABJマークは、この電子書店・電子書籍配信サービスが、著作権者からコンテンツ使用許諾を得た正規版配信サービスであることを示す登録商標(登録番号第6091713号)です。 (C) Shogakukan Inc. 2024 All rights reserved. No reproduction or republication without written permission.

item.title: Mike Lindell, a leader of the election denial movement who w…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Mike Lindell, a leader of the election denial movement who was endorsed by President Trump for Minnesota governor this week, acknowledged that he is not registered to vote in his home state. nyti.ms/3REK2zf
item.content:encoded: Mike Lindell, a leader of the election denial movement who was endorsed by President Trump for Minnesota governor this week, acknowledged that he is not registered to vote in his home state. nyti.ms/3REK2zf

item.title: Here is some Canadian Trivia: 1) For every person in Canada,…
item.author: Trish 🇨🇦 Sorry! 🍁 (@trishly.bsky.social)
item.description:
Here is some Canadian Trivia:
1) For every person in Canada, there are approx 9,000 trees.
2) Canada's boreal zone spans roughly 1.3 billion acres or approx. 55% to 58% of Canada's total landmass.
3) 70% of Canada's boreal forest zone has no road access, remaining as pristine, intact wilderness.
item.content:encoded:
Here is some Canadian Trivia:
1) For every person in Canada, there are approx 9,000 trees.
2) Canada's boreal zone spans roughly 1.3 billion acres or approx. 55% to 58% of Canada's total landmass.
3) 70% of Canada's boreal forest zone has no road access, remaining as pristine, intact wilderness.

item.title: Mamdani left soccer field lights on all night…..the lights u…
item.author: [giver of problems: pro max✨] (@jforjae.bsky.social)
item.description:
Mamdani left soccer field lights on all night…..the lights usually go off at 10pm.

They set a camera up and guess what they saw??

Residents playing soccer with their friends ALL NIGHT. One man said how much he loved it because his friends work late and can’t get to the field before 10pm.
item.content:encoded:
Mamdani left soccer field lights on all night…..the lights usually go off at 10pm.

They set a camera up and guess what they saw??

Residents playing soccer with their friends ALL NIGHT. One man said how much he loved it because his friends work late and can’t get to the field before 10pm.

item.title: Sanctuary 🐈‍⬛🐈 🐄🐖🐓🐐🐄🐐 🐈 Robert Downey Jr. maintains…
item.author: eugeniat2.bsky.social (@eugeniat2.bsky.social)
item.description:
Sanctuary 🐈‍⬛🐈
🐄🐖🐓🐐🐄🐐
🐈
Robert Downey Jr. maintains an animal sanctuary on his Malibu property where he rescued and cares for alpacas, goats, pigs, chickens, cows, and cats.
🐈
Robert Downey Jr. Kindness to animals.
#caturday #sanctuary
item.content:encoded:
Sanctuary 🐈‍⬛🐈
🐄🐖🐓🐐🐄🐐
🐈
Robert Downey Jr. maintains an animal sanctuary on his Malibu property where he rescued and cares for alpacas, goats, pigs, chickens, cows, and cats.
🐈
Robert Downey Jr. Kindness to animals.
#caturday #sanctuary

item.description: She needed 4 consecutive free throws to win a car. No pressure, right? The crowd held their breath for every single shot.

item.title: This is Maya. She couldn't decide between taking a swim and …
item.author: WeRateDogs (@weratedogs.com)
item.description: This is Maya. She couldn't decide between taking a swim and taking a nap, so she chose to do both. 13/10 (TT: tinychihuahuacedric)
item.content:encoded: This is Maya. She couldn't decide between taking a swim and taking a nap, so she chose to do both. 13/10 (TT: tinychihuahuacedric)

item.title: ¡A POR EL ORO! La selección española femenina de baloncesto…
item.author: DeportistasCTXT (@deportistasctxt.bsky.social)
item.description:
¡A POR EL ORO!

La selección española femenina de baloncesto sub-17 jugará la final del Mundial de la categoría tras ganar a Australia por 58-51 en un partido que se decidió en los últimos minutos.

El rival por el título será Estados Unidos o Canadá.
item.content:encoded:
¡A POR EL ORO!

La selección española femenina de baloncesto sub-17 jugará la final del Mundial de la categoría tras ganar a Australia por 58-51 en un partido que se decidió en los últimos minutos.

El rival por el título será Estados Unidos o Canadá.

item.title: Canada's Boreal Forest isn't a neighborhood park—it’s one of…
item.author: GreyBruceInfo- Part Owner of Canada 🇨🇦 (@brucegreyinfo.bsky.social)
item.description:
Canada's Boreal Forest isn't a neighborhood park—it’s one of the largest intact ecosystems on Earth. 🌲
It covers roughly 1.3 billion acres (526 million hectares). That is an area comparable to the entire United States.
item.content:encoded:
Canada's Boreal Forest isn't a neighborhood park—it’s one of the largest intact ecosystems on Earth. 🌲
It covers roughly 1.3 billion acres (526 million hectares). That is an area comparable to the entire United States.

item.title: Accepting tickets to the Kennedy Center honors gala compromi…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
Accepting tickets to the Kennedy Center honors gala compromises FCC commissioners’ impartiality, ethics experts told ProPublica.

The agency’s chair, Brendan Carr, has been gifted at least $63,000 worth of tickets by CBS or its parent company.
item.content:encoded:
Accepting tickets to the Kennedy Center honors gala compromises FCC commissioners’ impartiality, ethics experts told ProPublica.

The agency’s chair, Brendan Carr, has been gifted at least $63,000 worth of tickets by CBS or its parent company.

item.title: The epic is projected to bring in between $120 million and $…
item.author: Forbes (@forbes.com)
item.description: The epic is projected to bring in between $120 million and $137 million in the U.S., likely becoming just the third movie of 2026 to open with more than $100 million domestically.
item.content:encoded: The epic is projected to bring in between $120 million and $137 million in the U.S., likely becoming just the third movie of 2026 to open with more than $100 million domestically.

item.title: up to a whole 25 attacks with this piece of Echeveria for @a…
item.author: Hampus Viklander (@spookystirfry.bsky.social)
item.description:
up to a whole 25 attacks with this piece of Echeveria for @anireal.bsky.social, your paintings are always so incredibly inspiring I felt I had to go if not full out at least 90% there with this attack!

#artfight2026
item.content:encoded:
up to a whole 25 attacks with this piece of Echeveria for @anireal.bsky.social, your paintings are always so incredibly inspiring I felt I had to go if not full out at least 90% there with this attack!

#artfight2026

item.title: My constant companion had surgery yesterday to remove 2 grow…
item.author: Sue (@cameratrapsue.bsky.social)
item.description: My constant companion had surgery yesterday to remove 2 growths. One on side was not sent for testing. One on leg sent for testing. Fingers crossed it’s nothing bad. He’s such a great dog, hope recovery goes smoothly. I will be home with him through it all.
item.content:encoded: My constant companion had surgery yesterday to remove 2 growths. One on side was not sent for testing. One on leg sent for testing. Fingers crossed it’s nothing bad. He’s such a great dog, hope recovery goes smoothly. I will be home with him through it all.
